Newsletter

Q3 2026 Edition

  
  

The Sound of Progress at Blissville Terraces

  
  

If you visit Sangotedo right now, you will notice a distinct sound changing the entire landscape. It is not just the hum of heavy machinery or the sharp strike of hammers, it is the sound of a big vision rapidly turning into concrete reality.

  

Welcome to Q3 2026.

  

Just a few months ago, we spoke about the "Sangotedo Inflection Point", the exact moment this neighborhood would shift from a "future prospect" into a high-yielding, premium powerhouse. Today, that moment is no longer a forecast. It is a visible truth right outside our windows.

  

Our physical progress is moving just as fast as the market. We are thrilled to share that we have hit these major milestones over the past quarter:

•

Completed all soil investigations and preliminary engineering. 

•

Finalized the master architectural and engineering designs. 

•

Developed 90% of the building frame for Block 1. 

•

Achieved 85% of the substructure for Block 2. 

•

Completed estate gate installation.

  
  

Roof Beam and Canopies Formwork in progress for Building 1

  
  

Ground Beam Formwork Installation for Building 2

  
  
  

Ground beam Rebar Installation for Building 2

  

Setting-Out for Piling Works – Building 3

  
  
  
  

Bored Pile Drilling and Installation Works Ongoing for Building 3 Foundation

  
  

Concrete Vibration during Pile Cap Casting

  
  

A Tale of Two Portfolios: The Visionary vs. The Spectator

In Lagos real estate, there are always two types of people: those who wait until a neighborhood is completely built out and expensive before they buy, and those who have the foresight to get in early.

  

By anchoring your investment in Blissville Terraces within the Caribbean Lake City Estate now, you firmly aligned yourself with the visionaries. While spectators in over-congested zones like Ajah are stuck battling the daily, exhausting gridlock of the highway, Blissville investors are watching a completely different story unfold, one rooted in innovation and intelligent design.

  

The Sangotedo Advantage

Older Districts:  Congested ➔ Prices Plateauing ➔ Highway Traffic
Blissville: Rising Infrastructure ➔ Exponential Capital Growth ➔ Private Jetty

  

If you look out toward the water right now, the Omu Creek Bridge project is no longer just a blueprint. It has materialized into a towering "silent wealth creator," visibly linking our estate closer to the historic Lagos-Calabar Coastal Road corridor.

Even better, the Estate Jetty is about to change your living experience. Imagine completely bypassing the asphalt jungle, stepping onto a speedboat, and cruising to Victoria Island in record time. For the crowd, that is a rare luxury, for you, it is about to be your daily routine.

  

The market has shifted, the infrastructure has jumped, and the story heavily favors those who didn't wait.
